activity_policy.note: Activities are synthetic examples for validating spatial discovery, signup, route guidance, and property operations.

activities.name: Weekend Parent-child Workshop
activities.description: A small weekend workshop for families to explore the community and complete a creative activity together.
activities.resident_value: Creates a low-pressure way for families to meet neighbors and become familiar with the playground area.
activities.property_value: Improves activity participation and creates measurable community engagement.
safety_notes: Children should be accompanied by guardians.
Participant information should not be publicly exposed.
ai_prompt_examples: What parent-child activities are happening this weekend?
Sign me up for the weekend workshop.

activities.name: Evening Basketball Meetup
activities.description: A lightweight sports meetup for residents who want to find basketball partners inside the community.
activities.resident_value: Creates a safe and contextual way to find sports partners nearby.
activities.property_value: Activates community sports space without relying only on chat groups.
safety_notes: Activity organizer identity should be verified.
Property rules for sports space usage should be shown before signup.
ai_prompt_examples: Is there any basketball activity this week?

activities.name: Community Explorer Trail
activities.description: A lightweight discovery trail that turns useful community places into check-in points and badge rewards.
activities.resident_value: Makes the community feel more alive and gives residents a reason to explore beyond daily errands.
activities.property_value: Turns onboarding and community culture into a repeatable engagement loop.
safety_notes: Quest progress should be private by default.
Children should be accompanied by guardians.
ai_prompt_examples: Help my family explore the community.
What badge can I unlock today?

activities.name: Fire Passage Safety Check
activities.description: An internal safety inspection scenario that can later be converted into a robot patrol workflow.
activities.resident_value: Improves community safety through more structured inspection routines.
activities.property_value: Connects property operations with robot-ready semantic routes.
safety_notes: This is an internal operation activity.
Robot or camera data requires explicit governance before real-world deployment.
ai_prompt_examples: Create a safety patrol for the fire passage.
